cow_move_rate.note: cow attempts a random-direction move w.p. 0.5; observed rate is lower than 0.5 by the blocked-move fraction (attempts into non-walkable cells fail silently) — expected_success = 0.5 * P(free cell)

zombie_chase_rate.expected: >=0.9 among successful moves (chase p=0.9, long/short axis 0.8/0.2; blocked chase steps drop out of the moved-denominator)
